{{Quote|My world is a troubled one. It has always been thus.|[[Grand Duke]] [[Gror Pernon]]|<ref name="TWP" />}}
'''Eiattu 6''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Commonly called simply '''Eiattu''' by its inhabitants, it was ruled by a monarchy.

==Geography==
[[File:ImperialCitadelEiattu6-TWP3.jpg|thumb|left|160px|The [[Imperial Citadel (Eiattu 6)|Imperial Citadel]]]]

[[Color/Legends|Red-purple]] plants dotted the landscape, while the swamps were filled with large feathered-reptilian beasts, such as [[thuvasaur]]s and native [[thak]]s.<ref name="TWP" />

Eiattu's [[Eiattu 6's capital city|capital]] served as a port on one of the planet's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]].<ref name="TWP" />

==History==
===Imperial period===
{{Quote|Years ago, with the fall of the Old Republic, Emperor Antbbianplourr III bartered away our pride and our honor to keep the throne, and the Imperials from our world. This was the beginning of the end for us.|[[Grand Duke]] [[Gror Pernon]]|<ref name="TWP" />}}
[[File:Eiattu6RoyalFamily-XWingRogueSquadron16.jpg|thumb|left|190px|Royal family: [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]] (far left), [[Kassen]] (right), [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]] (second right) and [[Harrandatha Estillo]] (third right)]]

The planet was ruled for centuries by the royal house of Eiattu 6. When the [[Declaration of a New Order]] transformed the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Antbbianplourr III]] made humiliating concessions to retain his throne and to prevent the deployment of Imperial forces to the planet. He was succeeded by his only son, [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]]. After five years of reign, the Empire dispatched [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tharil Tavira]] and a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to Eiattu.<ref name="TWP" />

The planet's nobles, known as the [[Priamsta]], later rebelled, believing that they could deal better with Tavira on their own terms. They overthrew and exiled the royal family, but a small faction murdered the family. The Priamsta took power on the world and acted as an oligarchy but found itself embroiled in a [[Eiattu Civil War|civil war]] against the [[People's Liberation Battalion]]. Years later, Moff Tharil Tavira was succeeded by his wife, a young native woman named [[Leonia Tavira]].<ref name="TWP" />

===New Republic era===
{{Quote|Perhaps after that, with newfound unity, we can then learn to walk together.|[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]]|<ref name="TWP" />}}
[[File:PLB_fighting.jpg|thumb|right|240px|The [[People's Liberation Battalion|PLB]] fighting [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in the swamps of Eiattu]]

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Priamsta discovered that an heiress to the royal line had survived, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]], also known as [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] Plourr Ilo. She returned to rule her people with the support of the nobility which intended to counteract another royal heir, Prince [[Harrandatha Estillo (impostor)|Harrandatha Estillo]], who had joined the People's Liberation Battalion. A [[Eiattu Campaign|battle]] soon erupted in which the PLB and Rogue Squadron defeated the Imperial forces on the planet, forcing Moff Tavira to flee Eiattu. During the battle, Princess Isplourrdacartha revealed Prince Harrandatha as an impostor and an Imperial agent, gaining the recognition of the People's Liberation Battalion. The Priamsta was eventually forced to adjust to a new political situation, with a revitalized monarchy determined to rule in cooperation with the people.<ref name="TWP" />

Several months later, Rogue Squadron members, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] impersonating [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] went to a reception organized on Eiattu 6 by Princess Estillo in order to cover the true Leia's [[Undercover operation on Axxila|mission]] on [[Axxila/Legends|Axxila]]. However, Winter was [[Operation on Eiattu|kidnapped]] by [[Kavil's Corsairs|Leonia Tavira's pirates]], who intended to capture the true Leia Organa.<ref name="Masquerade">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Masquerade]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The novel ''[[I, Jedi]]'' erroneously called this world Eiattu 4.
